full_text:
Ge Ti 葛悌
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ge Ti (葛悌)was born in Jurong county, Danyang commandery. Served as Grand Administrator of Shaoling after surrendering to Jin. Ge Ti was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
